description: preflight macOS Screen Recording permission (checks/requests, records status)
rules: records status only — writes one status object (permissions.json) under record_store; mutates no user data
macOS-only live; the live check may pop one system prompt to request Screen Recording
off macOS records not_applicable; swift absent records unavailable; in a sandbox records blocked
usage: No vars. Run before window/app capture on macOS. Output: permissions.json (screen_recording: granted|not_granted|unavailable|blocked|not_applicable).
limitation: Only the live macOS path (swift + outside a sandbox) yields granted/not_granted; otherwise it records why the check could not run.
